channel.title: Prashant Deshmukh (sivedcodes)
channel.description: Android security, KMP, malware analysis articles by Prashant Deshmukh

item.title: OTP Bypass System Vulnerability
item.description: Early security research — OTP bypass via API session manipulation discovered in 2017.

item.title: CVE-2026-0098: Android Version Spoofing
item.description: How I discovered a critical Android vulnerability — from reverse engineering to Google's patch.

item.title: APK Binder: Android Binary Instrumentation
item.description: Technical deep dive into DEX injection, Smali patching, Metasploit integration, and antivirus evasion.

item.title: Building Offline-First Apps with KMP: Ustad Mobile
item.description: Building a cross-platform LMS with KMP, Jetpack Compose, and peer-to-peer sync.

item.title: From Android Developer to Malware Analyst
item.description: My transition from building apps to breaking them — lessons in reverse engineering and Google PHA.
